caribbean.headline: Moderate Winds and Showers Impact Freeport Bahamas Today
caribbean.paragraph: Freeport, Bahamas, is experiencing moderate winds sustained at 26 knots with wave heights reaching 4.1 feet and a dominant swell from the WSW at a 6-second period. Rain chances peak at 67 percent, indicating scattered showers likely affecting marine and port operations today.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact Marseille Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Marseille is experiencing heavy rainfall with a 95% chance of precipitation alongside sustained winds reaching 24 kt, below Small Craft Advisory thresholds. Wave heights are moderate at 4.7 ft with a dominant WSW swell direction and a 5-second swell period, posing manageable conditions for maritime operations.
